bead.title: Visibility 2: bump github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent to v0.3.5+
bead.description: Update cli/go.mod to bump github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent from v0.3.3 to v0.3.5 (or latest available GitHub release). Run `go mod tidy`. Fix any compile errors from API changes. Keep the pin to a GitHub release tag — do NOT add a `replace` directive pointing at /home/erik/Projects/agent. If the bump exposes breaking changes that affect ddx-agent integration, document them in the bead's completion note.
bead.acceptance: (1) cli/go.mod shows the new version. (2) `cd cli && go build ./...` passes. (3) `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -count=1` passes. (4) No replace directive in go.mod pointing at a local path. (5) Completion note lists any API changes that required ddx-side adjustments.
